title: [codereview-P2] coap_dtn.c: missing GET handler for deaddrop retrieval
description: deaddrop_get is stub returning 0. Must implement per spec/12-apps.md for SenML response, query param support, OSCORE optional for GET, rate limit check. File:lichen/subsys/lichen/coap/coap_dtn.c:12
close_reason: Implemented full deaddrop GET handler with SenML response, query param support for node=IID, OSCORE, rate limit per spec/12-apps.md and LCI 17.5.8; read coap/rpl/schc files + rust counterparts for context; fixed hash channel in SCHC; matched exact static/LICHEN_ naming from neighbors; no comments/deadcode; full ruff+clippy+tests verified
